title: The City of Doors
description: You discover a strange door you've never noticed before. Once you go through it, the world is not quite right. Soon you realize you're far from home in a world that looks deciptively like your own, in a city full of doors that lead to strange, dreamlike realities. And only one leads back to your home.

the_cell.title: The Cell
the_cell.basePrompt: You are trapped in a stone jail cell. The room has a bed, a chamber pot, and a bottle of water. Distant snoring echoes from a hallway beyond the locked cell door.
the_cell.onFreeformPrompt: Respond to the action naturally but do not allow escape yet. Keep response between 1 and 5 sentences.

exitVectors.intent: Find lock pick under the chamber pot and pick the lock
exitVectors.hint: Check the least pleasant object in the room. Something small is hidden there.
matchExamples: unlock the cell door with lock pick

next.endingText: You slip through the cell door into the hallway, unseen for now.
